macro_segments.title: Evil Merodach's Release of Yehoyachin: 37 Years After Exile, Confirming Belshatzar's 45-Year Count

micro_segments.title: Source: II Kings 25:27-29; Evil Merodach Released Yehoyachin in His First Regnal Year
Calculation: Year 8 of Nevuchadnezzar (Yehoyachin Exile) + 37 Years = Year 45 = Evil Merodach
Confirmation: Secular Historical Records Align with This Calculation of Evil Merodach's Reign
